title: Audit operating-protocol-schemas v0.1.0 typed surface — SOP layer comprehension
description: Comprehension bead 2/4 for agent-blame-shielded-workflow-doctrine. Read every public type in operating-protocol-schemas v0.1.0: OperatingProtocolModel (central SOP), OperatingProtocolAxiom (declared invariants), OperatingProtocolAxiomContextRef, OperatingProtocolStep, OperatingProtocolTrigger, OperatingProtocolOutcome, OperatingProtocolSchemaVersion. Produce a typed audit report covering: how Axioms compose with Steps; how Triggers fire (event-typed? state-typed? scheduled?); how Outcomes are verified at the end of a step or protocol; whether substrate has any concrete OperatingProtocolModel instances anywhere; the relationship between OperatingProtocolModel and WorkflowModel (is one a refinement of the other? are they independent? do they compose?). Output: extend the investigation report.
